title: The Art of War
author: Sun Tzu
content: “In the midst of chaos, there is also opportunity.”
action: Pivot your strategy to capitalize on environmental instability.

title: Brave New World
author: Aldous Huxley
content: “Actual happiness always looks pretty squalid in comparison with the overcompensations for misery.”
action: Reject artificial comforts that mask challenging, authentic progress.

title: Walden Two
author: B.F. Skinner
content: “The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.”
action: Audit your processes to ensure agency isn't being improperly outsourced.

title: The Myth of Sisyphus
author: Albert Camus
content: “The struggle itself toward the heights is enough to fill a man's heart. One must imagine Sisyphus happy.”
action: Find fulfillment in the labor of the task regardless of the outcome.

title: Meditations
author: Marcus Aurelius
content: “Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.”
action: Cease deliberation and move immediately to operational execution.
